---
title: "JSC370 Final Project"
author: "Christopher Li"
jupyter: python3
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: false
---

# Test test 1

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import statsmodels.api as sm
import numpy as np
import json
import plotly.express as px
import nltk

nltk.download("vader_lexicon")
from nltk.sentiment import SentimentIntensityAnalyzer
```
